name: Serenity Research
description_en: Source-backed investment research that hunts supply-chain bottlenecks, maps technology value chains, screens A-share/HK/US equities, and stress-tests theses.
description_zh: 有据可查的投研技能,挖掘供应链卡点、梳理技术价值链、筛选 A 股/港股/美股,并对投资论点做压力测试。
long_en: Outputs plain-language reasoning, ranked research priorities, evidence chains, risks, and next verification steps—research support only, with no trade execution.
long_zh: 输出通俗推理、排序的研究优先级、证据链、风险与后续验证步骤——仅作研究支持,不执行交易。
sec_note_en: Provides research only, not financial advice; verify data and do your own due diligence before investing.
sec_note_zh: 仅提供研究而非投资建议;投资前请核验数据并自行尽调。
